name: webrtc-rooms
description: The WebRTC infrastructure layer for Node.js. Ships everything a production video/audio platform needs as a single coherent system: a native zero-dependency SFU with simulcast and adaptive bitrate, multi-region orchestration with automatic failover, HMAC-signed session persistence, Redis pub/sub scaling, end-to-end encryption key exchange, per-subscriber quality scoring, SOC2/HIPAA-ready audit logging, GDPR consent and data residency enforcement, distributed tracing, Prometheus metrics, SLO health monitoring, threat detection with graduated response, backpressure-aware load shedding, idempotent event replay for reconnecting peers, structured moderation with capability enforcement, signed webhook delivery, TURN credential generation, and a CLI that scaffolds a production-ready server in under a minute.

scripts.test: node tests/index.test.js && node tests/redis-persistence-e2e.test.js && node tests/features.test.js && node tests/test1.test.js && node tests/test2.test.js && node tests/test3.test.js
scripts.release:check: npm test && npm run typecheck && npm pack --dry-run
